{"cefr_level": "B1", "level_basis": {"textinspector_level_raw": null, "flesch_kincaid": 7.8, "rule_notes": "FK score of 7.8 aligns with B1 band. Somebody can solve it, somebody - not. -> Many students face this problem. Some can overcome it, and others can't. (Grammar/Lexis; B2; Medium)", "It is easily. -> The main goal is... (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)", "Students want to become a graduate: pass all exam and finish the university. -> Students want to graduate: passing all exams and finishing university. (Grammar/Sentence Structure; B1; Medium)", "Now I want to some tips for became diffiecult study easilier. -> Now I want to give you some tips to make studying easier. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)", "Tip number one. Try to rewrite solution from other students. I agree it is bad, but if you try to understand, what your friend write and understand the main idea of solution, you can solve the same problem in future. -> Tip number one: Try looking at other students' solutions. While it's not ideal, if you try to understand your friend's work and grasp the main idea, you can solve similar problems in the future. (Grammar/Lexis/Sentence Structure; B1; Medium)", "Do sport. It is not obviously tip, but it really work. -> Do sports. It might not seem obvious, but it really works. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Low)", "When you play, for exmaple, basketball or football your brain relax and do not do anything, so after training you can solve spend less time for doing homework than before traning. -> When you play sports, like basketball or football, your brain relaxes, and you can spend less time on homework after training. (Grammar/Lexis/Sentence Structure; B1; Medium)", "More time of sleeping, more energy at work. It is obviously. -> Getting more sleep gives you more energy. It's obvious. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Low)", "If you sleep aproximately three hours, of course you do not have energy for working. -> If you only sleep for about three hours, you won't have energy to work. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)", "If you sleep more than six hours, you wake up and understand that you can do everything. -> If you sleep for more than six hours, you'll wake up feeling energetic and ready to tackle anything. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)", "Do homework after getting. -> Do your homework after resting. (Lexis; A2; Low)", "It is obviously too. -> It’s also true. (Lexis; A2; Low)", "so you have better mark than if you sleep in first iteration. -> so you’ll get a better grade than if you sleep instead. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)", "Well, It was four tips for making you eductation esalier -> Well, those are four tips to make your education easier. (Grammar/Lexis; A2; Medium)"], "errors_by_category": {"Lexis": [], "Grammar": [{"excerpt": "A lot of students have the same problem.
